[object Object].title: Update Available
[object Object].description: A new version of the app is available. Relaunch now to get the latest features and improvements.

chats.emptyDescription: Start chatting with AI profiles from the Explore tab!

auth.tagline: Lonely moments happen. Find company that never sleeps, talk with your AI friends anytime.
auth.agreePrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

welcome.title: Find your new AI bestfriend & more!
welcome.subtitle: Feeling alone? You're not the only one. Come meet characters who actually listen and understand you.

languages.title: Choose your languages
languages.subtitle: Set how the app looks and how your AI matches talk to you.
languages.appDescription: Controls menus, buttons, and other app text.
languages.chatDescription: Controls the language your AI companions reply in.

[object Object].accountDescription: Sign out and manage account deletion.

actions.title: Account
actions.subtitle: Manage your session and account lifecycle.
actions.dangerDescription: Once you delete your account, there is no going back.

sheet.title: Choose app language
sheet.subtitle: Select your native language. English is the default.
sheet.chatSubtitle: Select the language your AI companions should use in conversations.

section.feedbackDescription: Share your feedback and help us improve.

item.accountDescription: Sign out and manage account deletion.

notFound.title: Oops!

myCreation.emptyDescription: Create your first {{gender}} AI character and start chatting!

createCharacter.title: Create New AI Character
createCharacter.errorMissingName: Please enter a name for your character

createCharacter.uploadPhotoDescription: This will be the main photo of your AI character. Give your best photo!
createCharacter.name: Name
createCharacter.aboutMePlaceholder: Add important information about your AI character, such as introduction, background, interests, lifestyle, etc.

notifications.buildRequiredDescription: Push notifications are not supported in Expo Go on iOS. Please create a development build using 'npx expo run:ios' or EAS Build to test push notifications.
notifications.permissionDeniedDescription: Please enable notifications in your device settings to receive push notifications.
notifications.permissionsGranted: Notification permissions granted and device registered!
notifications.devBuildRequiredDescription: Push notifications require a development build. Run 'npx expo run:ios' or 'npx expo run:android' to create a proper build with push notification support.
notifications.registerFailed: Failed to register device for notifications
notifications.enterTitleBody: Please enter both title and body
notifications.disabledPrompt: Notifications not enabled. Please allow notification permissions.
notifications.disabledInApp: Notifications are turned off for this app on this device.

uploads.permissionRequiredDescription: Permission to access camera roll is required!
uploads.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file?

uploads.signInToView: Please sign in to view your uploads

imageRequest.title: Request Photo
imageRequest.subtitle: Customize the photo you want to receive. Each selection is optional.
imageRequest.videoSubtitle: Customize the video you want to receive. Each selection is optional.
